videos.headline: Germie Bernard's late TD wins it for Alabama
videos.description: Germie Bernard takes it to the house for a 25-yard rushing touchdown to seal a 29-22 win over South Carolina.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Germie Bernard's late TD wins it for Alabama) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama survives vs. South Carolina
videos.description: Alabama comes up clutch in final minutes to pick up the road win over South Carolina.

tracking.trackingName: COM_NCF Highlight (Alabama survives vs. South Carolina) 2025/10/25 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (William Joyce kicks 24-yard field goal) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama’s DaShawn Jones takes deflection back for a pick-six
videos.description: DaShawn Jones scores on a pick-six after Rahsul Faison has the ball pop out of his hands.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama’s DaShawn Jones takes deflection back for a pick-six) 2025/10/25 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (William Joyce kicks 34-yard field goal) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama's 4th-down gamble pays off as Simpson hits Cuevas for a TD
videos.description: Ty Simpson connects with Josh Cuevas for a touchdown on fourth down.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama's 4th-down gamble pays off as Simpson hits Cuevas for a TD) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: Sellers finds Harbor with beautiful pass for a South Carolina TD
videos.description: LaNorris Sellers drops a dime to Nyck Harbor for a 54-yard South Carolina touchdown vs. Alabama.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Sellers finds Harbor with beautiful pass for a South Carolina TD) 2025/10/25 ESHEET
NCF_One-Play (William Joyce makes 47-yard field goal) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: LaNorris Sellers extends the Gamecocks' lead in the 4th
videos.description: LaNorris Sellers runs for a 10-yard South Carolina touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (LaNorris Sellers extends the Gamecocks' lead in the 4th) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: South Carolina recovers its own punt
videos.description: Nyck Harbor recovers Mason Love’s punt off an Alabama player.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (South Carolina recovers its own punt) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: Alabama scores TD, converts tricky 2-point conversion to tie score late
videos.description: Germie Bernard scores an Alabama TD, setting up the 2-point conversion to tie the score against South Carolina.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Alabama scores TD, converts tricky 2-point conversion to tie score late) 2025/10/25 ESHEET

videos.headline: Kalen DeBoer on Bama: 'We were great in the critical moments'
videos.description: DeBoer details how the No. 4 Crimson Tide battled adversity and delivered late, rallying to top South Carolina 29-22 in a hard-fought SEC showdown.
